title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends his heartfelt greetings to all beneficiaries of Pradhan Mantri Bharatiya Jan Aushadhi Yojana (PMBJP) on Jan Aushadhi Diwas 2026
text:
Press Release:Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Home Affairs

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends his heartfelt greetings to all beneficiaries of Pradhan Mantri Bharatiya Jan Aushadhi Yojana (PMBJP) on Jan Aushadhi Diwas 2026

This initiative of Modi government, as a historic step, has relieved the poor of the country from financial burden of medicines and spread awareness about generic medicines
Today, approximately 18,000 Jan Aushadhi Kendras across the country are providing affordable and accessible medicines to the poor and needy
This scheme has saved the countrymen over ₹40,000 crore

Posted On:
07 MAR 2026 1:07PM by PIB Delhi

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah has extended his heartfelt greetings to all beneficiaries of Pradhan Mantri Bharatiya Jan Aushadhi Yojana (PMBJP) on Jan Aushadhi Diwas 2026.

In a post on X platform, Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah said that this initiative of Modi government, as a historic step, has relieved the poor of the country from financial burden of medicines and spread awareness about generic medicines. He said that today, approximately 18,000 Jan Aushadhi Kendras across the country are providing affordable and accessible medicines to the poor and needy. Shri Shah said that this scheme has saved the countrymen over ₹40,000 crore.

#JanAushadhiDiwas2026
 पर प्रधानमंत्री भारतीय जन औषधि योजना के सभी लाभार्थियों को हार्दिक शुभकामनाएँ। मोदी सरकार की इस पहल ने देश के गरीबों को दवाइयों के आर्थिक बोझ से राहत दिलाने और जेनेरिक दवाओं के प्रति जागरूकता फैलाने का ऐतिहासिक कार्य किया है।
आज देश में लगभग 18,000 जन औषधि…
pic.twitter.com/I3PoSVUuXx
— Amit Shah (@AmitShah)
March 7, 2026

***
